itungannya 3 + 12 bang, soalnya kan awal-awal dupe sampe 3 bintang. terus kalau udah 3 dupe, baru jadi +1 sampai +12

Added "First Press Limited" wake-up, the secret keeper has a chance to "wake up 5 times" for free. When you are not satisfied with the wake-up result, you can perform unlimited "re-wake-up"!
Every time you "awaken 5 times", you will definitely get 1 of the 20 permanent awakened bodies in the "Boundary Study"!
Bisa reset pull sampe dapet awaker yang kita mau gitu?

During the event, log in every day to get the new SSR life wheel "Rebirth in the Obscuration" with the energy-charging attributes of madness, and you can get up to 16!

mayan nih free e15 wheel anniv

Life wheel effect: After the equipment player releases the madness burst, the basic damage of the madness burst is increased by 7/8/9/10%, and the shield and life recovery are increased by 2/3/4/5%, and can be stacked up to 5 times. After completing the exploration, the equipers obtain a homology increase of 10/15/20/25%.

sacrifice 1k layer dmg yang diterima ya 1k, trus ngapus 500 layer
jadi sacrifice itu fungsinya buat apa?
pengen nyoba murphy tapi gak paham sama skill
Kalo mau liat efek sacri main di ch6 trus nyari musuh yang ikan ada tangan diperut, biasanya tu ikan sepasang
Kalo ga ya minjem murphy di event
udah, cuman ya gitu masih bingung sama efek sacrifice
kalau cuman 1 karakter yang mati baru
Kalo g paham coba aja di stage
Tu sacrifice bisa di ilangin 50% pake cost 3
Mirip caro, kalo caro langsung ngurangin hp, kalo sacri per layer
Ada tuh shield gratis 0 arith tapi bayaran nya sacrifice
Dmg sacrifice itu 1:1, 1 layer 1 dmg, next turn itu sacri bakal ilang 50%
Biasanya luck pas Lagi capek kadang hoki pak
biasanya kalau gak ngarep dapet pak
berarti efeknya kek kena poison kah?
Pois, bleed, sacri, counter . mirip mirip
terus benefit nya apa? khususnya di karakter murpy?
kalau di murphy itu 50% ngurangin damage tapi tapi kena sacrifice
Butuh tumbal buat sesuatu yang besar
Reduce 50% dmg itu gacor, dmg yang diterima habis exalt bakal jadi sacrifice, mangkanya dipakein cost 3
akhirnya paham fungsi sacrefice di murphy
